provisioningState.description: The status of the cognitive services account at the time of the operation.

endpoints.description: Dictionary of endpoints for the cognitive services account.

capabilities.description: The capabilities of the cognitive services account.

isMigrated.description: Whether this account has been migrated.

customSubDomainName.description: Optional subdomain name used for token-based authentication.

publicNetworkAccess.description: Whether or not public endpoint access is allowed.

disableLocalAuth.description: Whether to disable local authentication methods.

restrictOutboundNetworkAccess.description: Whether to restrict outbound network access.
